task.goal: Implement Memo phases 1-4: daemon memo state + RPC, MCP memo tools, memo-observe CLI shim, and watcher-driven stale marking with hash_only freshness
success_criteria: Daemon supports memo_observe, memo_status, memo_session_start, memo_session_end
MCP exposes memo_status and memo_session tools
CLI adds memo-observe subcommand to parse hook payload and send RPC
Watcher marks changed paths stale across sessions
constraints: Keep scope to phases 1-4; exclude phase 5 replay harness
Use hash_only mode for freshness in this pass

warnings: Only partial automated verification was discovered. Consider adding a stronger success signal.
